communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, I request the following records related to the 1994 investigation of Larry DeWayne Hall (DOB: December 11, 1962):
1. Complete evidence inventory from the search of Larry DeWayne Hall's vehicle (1984 Dodge van) conducted in November 1994
2. All fingerprint analysis records collected during this investigation
3. All interview records, notes, or memoranda pertaining to Gary Wayne Hall (twin brother of Larry DeWayne Hall, DOB: December 11, 1962)
4. Any records indicating whether Gary Wayne Hall was considered as an alternative suspect or interviewed as a witness
I am an independent researcher. I am willing to pay reasonable fees for this request.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Roberto Alexander Salomon
